professor.biography_text: 个人简历(Biography) 教育背景:(Educational Background) 1996.9 - 2000.6 于北京理工大学计算机科学工程系读本科，获工学学士学位 1996.9 - 2000.6 Department of Computer Science and Engineering, Beijing Institute of Technology. Bachelor Degree 2000.9 - 2003.3 于北京理工大学计算机科学工程系读研究生，获工学硕士学位 2000.9 - 2003.3 Department of Computer Science and Engineering, Beijing Institute of Technology. Master Degree 2006.9 - 2013.1 于北京理工大学计算机学院在职读博，获工学博士学位 2006.9 - 2013.1 School of Computer Science & Technology, Beijing Institute of Technology. PhD Degree 工作经历:(Working Experience) 2003.4 - 现在 在北京理工大学软件学院任教师 2003.4 - now Teacher in School of Software, Beijing Institute of Technology
